meta.title: Knowledge Base — Vincor | Articles about jaw, posture and health
meta.description: Read articles and insights about jaw problems, posture issues, CMD and the relationship between bite and body. The Vincor Knowledge Base.

hero.title: Knowledge Base
hero.description: Articles and insights about jaw, posture and health

articles.title: How to recognize CMD?
articles.excerpt: Jaw pain, headaches, clicking in the jaw joint? These are common signs of CMD. Learn to recognize the 7 most important symptoms.

articles.title: The relationship between jaw and back
articles.excerpt: Back pain without a clear cause? The link may lie in your jaw. Discover how a disturbed bite can affect your entire posture.
articles.imageAlt: The relationship between jaw and back

articles.title: What is an occlusal scan?
articles.excerpt: Everything about the DIERS 4D Spinescan: how it works, what it measures and why it is safer and faster than traditional diagnostics.

articles.title: When do you need a jaw splint?
articles.excerpt: Not every jaw problem requires a splint. Learn when a therapeutic jaw splint is meaningful and what the difference is with a regular bite plate.

cta.title: Do you have a question that is not answered here?
cta.description: Feel free to contact us. We are happy to help you further.
